title: Tefal Comfort Max 26cm Stainless Steel Frying Pan, Durable Non-Stick Pan with Thermo-Spot Heat Indicator, Induction Compatible Base, Comfortable Grip Handle, G7260544
features: Perfect Cooking Results Every Time: Tefal’s innovative Thermo-Spot heat indicator clearly shows when your pan has reached the optimum cooking temperature, eliminating guesswork and ensuring perfectly cooked meals

Effortless Cooking and Cleaning: Superior non-stick coating ensures smooth food release, allowing you to cook with minimal oil and making clean-up quick and easy—saving you valuable time in the kitchen
Versatile All-Hob Compatibility: Robust, high-impact bonded base guarantees fast and even heat distribution on all stovetop types, including induction, ensuring consistent cooking performance

Durable and Safe Stainless Steel Design: Crafted from premium stainless steel that is oven safe up to 175°C and dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, offering exceptional durability and convenient everyday use
Secure and Comfortable Grip: Ergonomically designed handle provides a comfortable and secure grip that stays cool during cooking, offering enhanced safety and confidence while preparing meals

specifications_table.Specific uses: ‎Sautéing vegetables, pan-frying meats or fish, griddling pancakes or eggs, searing steaks, cooking omelets, and grilling burgers
